initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN customers.Currency = 'CZK' THEN yearmonth.Consumption ELSE 0 END) -
    SUM(CASE WHEN customers.Currency = 'EUR' THEN yearmonth.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE yearmonth.Date LIKE '2012%';

SELECT 
    customers.Currency,
    SUM(yearmonth.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    yearmonth.Date LIKE '2012%'
GROUP BY 
    customers.Currency;

SELECT 
  customers.Currency,
  SUM(yearmonth.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
  yearmonth
JOIN 
  customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
  yearmonth.Date LIKE '2012%'
GROUP BY 
  customers.Currency;

SELECT 
    customers.Currency,
    SUM(yearmonth.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE yearmonth.Date LIKE '2012%'
GROUP BY customers.Currency

SELECT 
    customers.Currency,
    SUM(yearmonth.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    yearmonth.Date LIKE '2012%'
GROUP BY 
    customers.Currency;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT  
    (SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth ym 
     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
     WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2012%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK') 
    - 
    (SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth ym 
     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
     WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2012%' AND c.Currency = 'EUR') 
    AS ConsumptionDifference

candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  (SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) 
   FROM yearmonth ym 
   JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
   WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2012%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK') 
  - 
  (SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) 
   FROM yearmonth ym 
   JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
   WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2012%' AND c.Currency = 'EUR') AS ConsumptionDifference

WITH consumption_by_currency AS (
  SELECT 
    customers.Currency,
    SUM(yearmonth.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
  FROM 
    yearmonth
  JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
  WHERE 
    yearmonth.Date LIKE '2012%'
  GROUP BY 
    customers.Currency
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT TotalConsumption FROM consumption_by_currency WHERE Currency = 'CZK') -
  (SELECT TotalConsumption FROM consumption_by_currency WHERE Currency = 'EUR') AS ConsumptionDifference
FROM 
  consumption_by_currency
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth ym 
     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
     WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2012%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK') -
    (SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth ym 
     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
     WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2012%' AND c.Currency = 'EUR') AS ConsumptionDifference

SELECT  
    (SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth ym 
     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
     WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2012%' AND c.Currency = 'CZK') 
    - 
    (SELECT SUM(ym.Consumption) 
     FROM yearmonth ym 
     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID 
     WHERE ym.Date LIKE '2012%' AND c.Currency = 'EUR') 
    AS ConsumptionDifference
